violations.description: POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): The wing sauce was labeled for a 24-hour hold time but it had been used to toss wings. Once used with chicken the sauce becomes a TCS food and must be discarded within 4 hours. A critical violation was not cited because this was verbally communicated to the inspector; however any time a label is used it must reflect the 4-hour limit. Additionally the container must be washed rinsed and sanitized every 4 hours after the sauce is discarded.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Sides of chicken breading cooler noted not clean.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen under and around chicken breading area noted in need of cleaning.
